canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>aurora</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
body { 
  background: #000; 
  overflow: hidden; 
  cursor: crosshair;
}
canvas { display: block; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('c');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

let w, h;
let mouseX = 0.5, mouseY = 0.5;
let solarIntensity = 1;
let time = 0;

// Stars - static background
let stars = [];

function resize() {
  w = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  h = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
  generateStars();
}

function generateStars() {
  stars = [];
  const count = Math.floor((w * h) / 3000);
  for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    stars.push({
      x: Math.random() * w,
      y: Math.random() * h * 0.7,
      size: Math.random() * 1.5 + 0.5,
      brightness: Math.random() * 0.5 + 0.3
    });
  }
}

// Simplex-ish noise (simplified)
function noise(x, y, z) {
  const X = Math.floor(x) & 255;
  const Y = Math.floor(y) & 255;
  const Z = Math.floor(z) & 255;
  x -= Math.floor(x);
  y -= Math.floor(y);
  z -= Math.floor(z);
  
  // Simple hash-based noise
  const hash = (a, b, c) => {
    let h = a * 374761393 + b * 668265263 + c * 1274126177;
    h = (h ^ (h >> 13)) * 1274126177;
    return (h & 0x7fffffff) / 0x7fffffff;
  };
  
  const fade = t => t * t * t * (t * (t * 6 - 15) + 10);
  const lerp = (a, b, t) => a + t * (b - a);
  
  const u = fade(x);
  const v = fade(y);
  const w = fade(z);
  
  return lerp(
    lerp(
      lerp(hash(X, Y, Z), hash(X+1, Y, Z), u),
      lerp(hash(X, Y+1, Z), hash(X+1, Y+1, Z), u),
      v
    ),
    lerp(
      lerp(hash(X, Y, Z+1), hash(X+1, Y, Z+1), u),
      lerp(hash(X, Y+1, Z+1), hash(X+1, Y+1, Z+1), u),
      v
    ),
    w
  );
}

// Aurora curtain class
class AuroraCurtain {
  constructor(baseY, hueStart, hueEnd, speed, amplitude) {
    this.baseY = baseY;
    this.hueStart = hueStart;
    this.hueEnd = hueEnd;
    this.speed = speed;
    this.amplitude = amplitude;
    this.offset = Math.random() * 1000;
    this.ribbonCount = 3 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 3);
  }
  
  draw(t) {
    const intensity = solarIntensity;
    
    for (let r = 0; r < this.ribbonCount; r++) {
      const ribbonOffset = r * 0.3;
      
      ctx.beginPath();
      
      // Build the ribbon shape
      const points = [];
      const segments = 80;
      
      for (let i = 0; i <= segments; i++) {
        const x = (i / segments) * w;
        const normX = i / segments;
        
        // Multiple layers of noise for organic movement
        const n1 = noise(normX * 2 + this.offset, t * this.speed * 0.3 + ribbonOffset, 0);
        const n2 = noise(normX * 4 + this.offset, t * this.speed * 0.5 + ribbonOffset + 100, 0);
        const n3 = noise(normX * 0.5 + this.offset, t * this.speed * 0.1 + ribbonOffset + 200, 0);
        
        // Mouse influence - creates waves emanating from cursor
        const mouseInfluence = Math.sin((normX - mouseX) * 10 + t * 2) * 
                               Math.exp(-Math.abs(normX - mouseX) * 3) * 50 * intensity;
        
        const wave = (n1 - 0.5) * this.amplitude * intensity * 100 +
                     (n2 - 0.5) * this.amplitude * intensity * 40 +
                     (n3 - 0.5) * this.amplitude * intensity * 150 +
                     mouseInfluence;
        
        const y = this.baseY * h + wave;
        points.push({ x, y });
      }
      
      // Draw filled ribbon with gradient
      const curtainHeight = 80 + intensity * 120 + r * 20;
      
      for (let i = 0; i < points.length - 1; i++) {
        const p1 = points[i];
        const p2 = points[i + 1];
        
        // Vertical gradient for each segment
        const gradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(p1.x, p1.y - curtainHeight, p1.x, p1.y + 30);
        
        // Calculate hue based on position and time
        const hueNoise = noise(i / segments * 3 + t * 0.2, ribbonOffset, 0);
        const hue = this.hueStart + (this.hueEnd - this.hueStart) * hueNoise;
        
        // Brightness varies along the curtain
        const brightness = 0.3 + noise(i / segments * 5, t * 0.4 + ribbonOffset, 0) * 0.7;
        const alpha = 0.1 + brightness * 0.25 * intensity;
        
        gradient.addColorStop(0, `hsla(${hue}, 100%, 70%, 0)`);
        gradient.addColorStop(0.3, `hsla(${hue}, 90%, 60%, ${alpha * 0.3})`);
        gradient.addColorStop(0.6, `hsla(${hue}, 85%, 55%, ${alpha * 0.7})`);
        gradient.addColorStop(0.85, `hsla(${hue}, 80%, 50%, ${alpha})`);
        gradient.addColorStop(1, `hsla(${hue}, 70%, 40%, ${alpha * 0.3})`);
        
        ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(p1.x, p1.y - curtainHeight);
        ctx.lineTo(p2.x, p2.y - curtainHeight);
        ctx.lineTo(p2.x, p2.y + 30);
        ctx.lineTo(p1.x, p1.y + 30);
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();
      }
      
      // Draw bright edge at bottom of curtain
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(points[0].x, points[0].y);
      for (let i = 1; i < points.length; i++) {
        ctx.lineTo(points[i].x, points[i].y);
      }
      
      const edgeHue = this.hueStart + (this.hueEnd - this.hueStart) * 0.5;
      ctx.strokeStyle = `hsla(${edgeHue}, 100%, 75%, ${0.3 * intensity})`;
      ctx.lineWidth = 2;
      ctx.shadowColor = `hsla(${edgeHue}, 100%, 70%, 0.8)`;
      ctx.shadowBlur = 20 * intensity;
      ctx.stroke();
      ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
    }
  }
}

// Create aurora curtains - cyan to pink to purple
const curtains = [
  new AuroraCurtain(0.25, 180, 200, 0.8, 0.8),   // Cyan, high up
  new AuroraCurtain(0.35, 280, 320, 1.0, 1.0),   // Magenta/pink, middle
  new AuroraCurtain(0.30, 260, 290, 0.6, 0.9),   // Purple, overlay
  new AuroraCurtain(0.40, 190, 210, 1.2, 0.7),   // Cyan tint, lower
];

// Web Audio for ambient hum
let audioCtx, gainNode, oscillators = [];
let audioInitialized = false;

function initAudio() {
  if (audioInitialized) return;
  audioInitialized = true;
  
  audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
  gainNode = audioCtx.createGain();
  gainNode.gain.value = 0.03;
  gainNode.connect(audioCtx.destination);
  
  // Multiple detuned oscillators for ethereal drone
  const freqs = [55, 82.5, 110, 165]; // A1, E2, A2, E3 - open fifths
  
  freqs.forEach((freq, i) => {
    const osc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
    const oscGain = audioCtx.createGain();
    
    osc.type = 'sine';
    osc.frequency.value = freq;
    oscGain.gain.value = 0.4 / (i + 1);
    
    // Slight detuning for richness
    const lfo = audioCtx.createOscillator();
    const lfoGain = audioCtx.createGain();
    lfo.frequency.value = 0.1 + Math.random() * 0.2;
    lfoGain.gain.value = freq * 0.003;
    lfo.connect(lfoGain);
    lfoGain.connect(osc.frequency);
    lfo.start();
    
    osc.connect(oscGain);
    oscGain.connect(gainNode);
    osc.start();
    
    oscillators.push({ osc, oscGain, lfo, lfoGain });
  });
}

function updateAudio() {
  if (!audioInitialized) return;
  
  // Modulate volume based on solar intensity
  const targetGain = 0.02 + solarIntensity * 0.04;
  gainNode.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(targetGain, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.1);
  
  // Subtle frequency shifts based on mouse
  oscillators.forEach((o, i) => {
    const baseFreq = [55, 82.5, 110, 165][i];
    const shift = (mouseY - 0.5) * 5;
    o.osc.frequency.linearRampToValueAtTime(baseFreq + shift, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.5);
  });
}

function drawStars() {
  stars.forEach(star => {
    const twinkle = 0.7 + Math.sin(time * 2 + star.x * 0.01) * 0.3;
    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${star.brightness * twinkle})`;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(star.x, star.y, star.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
  });
}

function draw() {
  time += 0.016;
  
  // Fade to black with slight persistence
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 5, 0.15)';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h);
  
  // Clear fully periodically to prevent buildup
  if (Math.floor(time * 60) % 300 === 0) {
    ctx.fillStyle = '#000005';
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h);
  }
  
  // Draw stars
  drawStars();
  
  // Draw aurora curtains (back to front)
  ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'screen';
  curtains.forEach(curtain => curtain.draw(time));
  ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over';
  
  // Subtle overall glow
  const glowGradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(
    w * mouseX, h * 0.3, 0,
    w * mouseX, h * 0.3, h * 0.8
  );
  glowGradient.addColorStop(0, `rgba(100, 200, 255, ${0.02 * solarIntensity})`);
  glowGradient.addColorStop(0.5, `rgba(200, 100, 255, ${0.01 * solarIntensity})`);
  glowGradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)');
  ctx.fillStyle = glowGradient;
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h);
  
  // Decay solar intensity back to base
  solarIntensity += (1 - solarIntensity) * 0.02;
  
  updateAudio();
  requestAnimationFrame(draw);
}

// Event listeners
window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
  mouseX = e.clientX / w;
  mouseY = e.clientY / h;
});

canvas.addEventListener('click', e => {
  // Solar flare - burst of activity
  solarIntensity = 2.5;
  initAudio();
});

canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', e => {
  initAudio();
  solarIntensity = 2.5;
});

canvas.addEventListener('touchmove', e => {
  const touch = e.touches[0];
  mouseX = touch.clientX / w;
  mouseY = touch.clientY / h;
});

// Initialize
resize();
draw();
</script>
</body>
</html>
